meaning: adj.[电]有损耗的 致损耗的
examples: Requirements gathering is a lossy form of compression.
It is also worth noting that adaptation might be lossy.
Larger files, not so much, unless you demand non-lossy images.
Lossy compression digital music files, such as MP3s, take up about 6 to 7 MB.
They weren't able to test out any lossless Dolby TrueHD soundtracks, but uncompressed PCM soundtracks on Sony Blu-ray movies blew away their lossy DD and DTS equivalents.
